title: Alberta tables bills on transgender youth health care, students' pronouns, opt-in sex education
author: Michelle Bellefontaine
notes: Bills-tabling source for EVT-033. October 31 2024: Education Amendment Act 2024, Health Statutes Amendment Act 2024, and Fairness and Safety in Sport Act tabled. Minors under 15 prohibited from hormone therapy and puberty blockers; parents must opt in to sex education. NDP criticized the bills as punching down on vulnerable youth. Author: Michelle Bellefontaine, CBC Edmonton.
